Build base URL

Source: R/api.R
api_buildurl.Rd

Build base URL

Usage

api_buildurl(endpoint, query = NA, database = NA, extension = "json")

Arguments

endpoint

The endpoint, e.g. articles/import

query

Query parameters for the endpoint

database

The database name

extension

Extension added to the URL path, defaults to json.
